reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 5 failed: 01e entry for PROP-6a4369e9-inv-050 not found in any 01e_PARTIAL_*.json files, preventing spec cross-reference validation. Code verification confirms Phase 03's analysis is accurate: retry_partial_batch (L1066-1108) catches NoPeer errors from retry_columns_by_range at L1102, logs them at L1103, but returns Ok(KeepChain) at L1107 without transitioning batch state. The batch remains in Downloading(Id) state permanently with no active sub-requests to fulfill it, as no requests are created when select_columns_by_range_peers_to_request fails with NoPeer at network_context.rs:L491. The batch won't be rescued by attempt_send_awaiting_download_batches (L957-986) since that only retries batches in AwaitingDownload state. Exploitability: An attacker controlling all custody peers for a column subnet or causing network partition can trigger NoPeer errors for partial batch retries, causing sync stall. Attack is attacker-triggered via P2P (UNTRUSTED boundary per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json). Impact: Sync stall affects individual node (single Lighthouse instance), not >5% of network, matching Medium severity threshold. Requires manual review due to missing 01e entry preventing definitive spec compliance verification.
